001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
004import java.util.LinkedHashSet;
005import java.util.List;
006import java.util.Set;
007
008/**
009 * Utility class for formatting breed summaries used on batch cards.
010 */
011public final class BatchCardSummaryFormatter {
012
013  private static final String BREED_PENDING = "Breed pending";
014  private static final int MAX_VISIBLE_BREEDS = 2;
015
016  private BatchCardSummaryFormatter() {
017  }
018
019  /**
020   * Builds a short, human-readable summary of the breeds in the given egg groups.
021   *
022   * <p>Distinct, non-blank breed names are collected in insertion order and then
023   * formatted as:
024   * <ul>
025   *   <li>{@code "Breed pending"} if no valid breeds are found,</li>
026   *   <li>{@code "Breed"} for a single breed,</li>
027   *   <li>{@code "Breed A, Breed B"} for up to two breeds, or</li>
028   *   <li>{@code "Breed A, Breed B +N"} when more than two breeds exist.</li>
029   * </ul>
030   *
031   * @param groups egg groups associated with a batch; may be {@code null} or empty.
032   * @return formatted breed summary string.
033   */
034  public static String buildBreedSummary(List<EggGroup> groups) {
035    if (groups == null || groups.isEmpty()) {
036      return BREED_PENDING;
037    }
038
039    Set<String> distinctBreeds = new LinkedHashSet<>();
040
041    for (EggGroup group : groups) {
042      if (group == null) {
043        continue;
044      }
045      String breed = group.getBreed();
046      if (breed != null) {
047        String normalized = breed.trim();
048        if (!normalized.isBlank()) {
049          distinctBreeds.add(normalized);
050        }
051      }
052    }
053
054    if (distinctBreeds.isEmpty()) {
055      return BREED_PENDING;
056    }
057
058    List<String> breeds = List.copyOf(distinctBreeds);
059
060    if (breeds.size() == 1) {
061      return breeds.get(0);
062    }
063
064    if (breeds.size() <= MAX_VISIBLE_BREEDS) {
065      return String.join(", ", breeds);
066    }
067
068    int remaining = breeds.size() - MAX_VISIBLE_BREEDS;
069    return breeds.get(0) + ", " + breeds.get(1) + " +" + remaining;
070  }
071}
